name: create_msg_db
full_help:
create_msg_db

Description: 
Create Message Db

Syntax: 
create_msg_db  [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      Message file to be created

Categories: 
Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
